description: Monograph; beginning of a work on kashrut, written at the request of a correspondent; the author states that he has already written a longer work on this subject. On verso  a colophon by Yehuda the Elder b. Netan'el. (FGP and AA)
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
